name: Automated Sentinel
visual_description: A towering stainless steel construct with a cylindrical head crowned by a crystalline eye, its armored frame layered with hydraulic hoses and mismatched salvaged plating. Dormant and motionless, it stands upright in a shadowed underground vault carved into stone, faint crystalline light emanating from its core.
full_prompt: A towering stainless steel construct with a cylindrical head crowned by a crystalline eye, its armored frame layered with hydraulic hoses and mismatched salvaged plating. Dormant and motionless, it stands upright in a shadowed underground vault carved into stone, faint crystalline light emanating from its core.. Stylized digital illustration, geometric composition, cool steel-blue and teal palette, screen-glow lighting, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
